title: Competency
description: A Competency node — a concrete professional capability the organization can perform (e.g. competency:rag-knowledge-retrieval). Classified into one or more CompetencyArea nodes via the 'classified_in' relation, and connected to people, resources, sectors and evidence via relations. A competency describes HOW work is delivered; WHAT is delivered to a customer is tracked separately in the Capability Registry.

id.description: Competency identifier. Grammar: 'competency:' prefix + dot-separated slug levels, each matching [a-z0-9-] (e.g. 'competency:rag-knowledge-retrieval').

name.description: Human-readable competency name in English per the competency catalog (e.g. 'RAG & Knowledge Retrieval')

description.description: Optional longer description of the competency
